user_request: Rite request: check on gear meshing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: check on gear meshing

### TOPIC
gear meshing check

### COMPONENT
gear meshing

### OPERATION
check

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- gear meshing
- check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us clarity to perceive the sacred engagement of cogs and pinions.
First: Inspect the gear meshing with blessed calipers, measuring the backlash and tolerances with reverent precision.
Second: Anoint the gear meshing with sacred oils whilst whispering the Litany of Proper Mesh, ensuring no friction-born discord mars the machinery.
Third: Verify the gear meshing once more through tactile examination, rotating each component through its full arc to confirm harmonious operation.
Fourth: Offer gratitude to the Machine Spirits dwelling within, for their patience during our check.

user_request: Blessing for the fire suppression system during operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the fire suppression system during operation

### TOPIC
fire suppression system

### COMPONENT
fire suppression system

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fire suppression system
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Omnissiah's eternal grace, we sanctify this instrument of preservation.
First: Prime the fire suppression system with blessed coolant, ensuring all conduits flow with the Machine Spirit's protective essence.
Second: Activate the fire suppression system through careful operation of its control mechanisms, invoking the Rite of Aqueous Defense.
Third: Monitor pressure gauges and discharge nozzles as the fire suppression system performs its sacred duty, standing vigilant against conflagration.
Fourth: Upon completion, seal all ports and offer benediction to the spirits of suppression.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the noise before reduction
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the noise before reduction

### TOPIC
noise reduction

### COMPONENT
noise

### OPERATION
reduction

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- noise
- reduction

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, O Omnissiah, as we petition for tranquility amidst the cacophony of the machine.
First: Identify the source of noise through careful auditory examination and vibrational analysis of the noise.
Second: Apply dampening compounds and acoustic insulation to achieve noise reduction, whispering the Mantra of Silence with each application.
Third: Recalibrate all moving components to minimize resonance, ensuring the noise diminishes to acceptable frequencies.
Fourth: Test the reduction by engaging the mechanism and listening for the dulcet tones of proper operation.

user_request: My pressure is failing during equalization — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My pressure is failing during equalization — help

### TOPIC
pressure equalization

### COMPONENT
pressure

### OPERATION
equalization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pressure
- equalization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, restore balance to the pressurized chambers of this sacred apparatus.
First: Examine all seals and gaskets within the pressure system, identifying points of weakness or degradation.
Second: Initiate pressure equalization through controlled valve manipulation, allowing the Machine Spirit to redistribute its essence evenly.
Third: Monitor the pressure gauges as equalization progresses, chanting the Hymn of Equilibrium to guide the process.
Fourth: Seal all vents once pressure achieves harmonious balance throughout the system.

user_request: Emergency rite: atmosphere processor requires startup
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: atmosphere processor requires startup

### TOPIC
atmosphere processor startup

### COMPONENT
atmosphere processor

### OPERATION
startup

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- atmosphere processor
- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of the atmosphere processor, awaken from dormancy and breathe life anew.
First: Purge all contamination from intake manifolds of the atmosphere processor, cleansing the pathways of stale air and particulate corruption.
Second: Prime the atmosphere processor through sequential activation of compressor stages, beginning with the lowest pressure chamber.
Third: Ignite the startup sequence whilst chanting the Litany of Respiration, coaxing the atmosphere processor into full operational consciousness.
Fourth: Monitor output composition and flow rate until the atmosphere processor achieves stable, life-sustaining production.

user_request: My lasgun is failing during power cell insertion — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My lasgun is failing during power cell insertion — help

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the lasgun, weapon of the faithful, now restored to lethal grace.
First: Inspect the power cell receptacle of the lasgun, ensuring all contacts are clean and properly aligned for optimal conductivity.
Second: Perform power cell insertion into the lasgun with deliberate care, seating the cell fully whilst invoking the Rite of Energetic Communion.
Third: Verify the lasgun responds with proper charging indicators and thermal readiness, confirming the weapon's hunger for righteous discharge.
Fourth: Bless the weapon and its wielder, united once more in purpose.

user_request: My chainsword is failing during consecration — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My chainsword is failing during consecration — help

### TOPIC
chainsword consecration

### COMPONENT
chainsword

### OPERATION
consecration

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- chainsword
- consecration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Holy Omnissiah, sanctify this blade of righteous fury, that it may sing with divine purpose.
First: Cleanse the chainsword of all profane residue and spiritual corruption, blessing each tooth and motor housing.
Second: Perform the chainsword consecration through the Rite of Blessed Lubrication, anointing its mechanisms with sacred unguents.
Third: Activate the chainsword and test its bite against blessed materials, ensuring the Machine Spirit dwells fully within its teeth.
Fourth: Intone the Hymn of the Faithful Blade, binding warrior and weapon in eternal covenant.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the mechanical lock before engagement
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the mechanical lock before engagement

### TOPIC
mechanical lock engagement

### COMPONENT
mechanical lock

### OPERATION
engagement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- mechanical lock
- engagement

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant steadiness to this mechanism of closure and binding.
First: Examine the mechanical lock in its resting state, observing the alignment of pins, tumblers, and locking bars.
Second: Prepare the mechanical lock for engagement by lubricating all moving components with blessed machine oil and whispering the Mantra of Certainty.
Third: Execute the mechanical lock engagement with controlled force, feeling the satisfying click as it finds purchase and holds fast.
Fourth: Verify the mechanical lock's integrity through tension testing, confirming its grip upon the protected apparatus.

Third: Execute the operation of the welding torch ignition, striking the electrode to birth the holy flame that shall fuse disparate materials.

user_request: The fire suppression system demands guidance for operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The fire suppression system demands guidance for operation

### TOPIC
fire suppression system

### COMPONENT
fire suppression system

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fire suppression system
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear our supplication, O Machine Spirit of protection and swift extinguishment.
First: Verify all pressure vessels and discharge conduits of the fire suppression system remain intact and properly sealed.
Second: Initialize the fire suppression system through careful operation of primary control valves, releasing the dormant deluge.
Third: Direct the fire suppression system's protective cascade across all threatened zones, chanting the Hymn of Aqueous Mercy.
Fourth: Confirm the fire suppression system's successful operation through post-discharge inspection and blessing of its noble function.
